PCNDto.DescriptionOfChange: Panasonic Corporation will shift to a holding company system Panasonic Holdings Corporation.we will change the company name on the labels to the new company name.
Panasonic will change the reel material from Paper to Plastic
Panasonic will change the reel material from Paper to Plastic
Change of the paper reel to plastic reel for aluminum electrolytic capacitors of surface-mount type (type V)
Change of the paper reel to plastic reel for aluminum electrolytic capacitors of surface-mount type (type V)
Change of the paper reel to plastic reel for aluminum electrolytic capacitors of surface-mount type (type V)
Product made on and after Feb 1, 2016: specs will be 5 to 35 oC, Relative Humidity of 45 to 85% for no more than 42 months.
Panasonic Electronic Components is announcing a packaging change for all SMT Aluminum Electrolytic,Capacitors that are produced at the Panasonic Industrial Devices Malaysia (PIDMY) facility.
Factory and country of origin approval request on Panasonic SMT Aluminum Electrolytic Capacitors (Panasonic Electronic Devices Malaysia Sdn. Bhd (PEDMA) / Malaysia)

In order to keep the stable global supply chain we have been increasing the production capacity especially in Malaysia for the business growth in the future to offer you most of our product range from two locations.
Lexcom Communications has been Acquired by Windstream.
Panasonic will discontinue all SMT Aluminum Capacitors containing lead (Pb) in its terminals, RoHS equivalent replacement parts provided for some devices on last time buy
IPS Alpha Technology, Ltd  has been Acquired By Panasonic.
Honda Connectors has been merged into Panasonic Electric Works Corporation of America.
SANYO Electric has Been Acquired by Panasonic.
V-FK series Non-RoHS Surface Mount Type Aluminum Electrolytic Capacitors are NOT RECOMMENDED FOR NEW DESIGN, RoHS compliant replacements are recommended
Matsushita Electric Works has been merged into Panasonic Electric Works Corporation of America.
Sunx Merged into Panasonic Electric Works Corporation of America.

feature.featureValue: Authorisation as biocide needed for product-type 7D: Allowed use as biocide in product-type 8Authorisation as biocide needed for product-type 9

GidepData.GIDEPDescription: Panasonic is issuing this notification to announce the reel material will change from Paper to Plastic. Reason for Change: The purposes of the reel changes are: 1. Increasing demand for plastic reels especially in automotive industry. 2. Increasing demand for plastic reels in surface-mount type Capacitors. 3. To reduce dust in Panasonic production lines coming from paper reels.
GidepData.DocumentNumber: Please Contact GIDEP for Document # X1-C-19-0322

RiskData.YeolComment: The part has surpassed a significant portion of its expected lifespan
